response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video content. 2. Observed that the audio track is purely instrumental throughout the video. 3. Concluded no vocal songs are present, making lyric searches unnecessary. 4. Mapped the visual slideshow into chronological scenes based on the transitions between different types of information displayed.
response.global_summary: This video is a looping presentation showcasing concert merchandise and a collection of fan messages for Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. The entire video is accompanied by an instrumental background music track with no vocals.

scenes.description: The video begins with an 'Attention for Visitors' slide.
A slide displays concert merchandise available for sale, including light sticks, T-shirts, towels, and more.
A slide shows additional concert merchandise including blankets, pouches, and acrylic panels.

A slideshow of various fan message cards and congratulatory notes for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert begins. This continues throughout the rest of the video as it cycles through different sets of messages.
A countdown/information slide indicating the concert will be starting soon.
The presentation loops back to the initial 'Attention for Visitors' slide.
